lp.subtitle:
View & inspect .pen design files directly in your browser.
No account. No upload. Fully client-side.
lp.feat.drag.title: Drag & Drop
lp.feat.drag.desc: Open any .pen file instantly. Or paste a URL. No sign-up required.
lp.feat.render.title: Full Rendering
lp.feat.render.desc: Shapes, text, gradients, shadows, icon fonts, flex layout — all rendered as SVG.
lp.feat.privacy.title: Privacy First
lp.feat.privacy.desc: Everything runs in your browser. Files never leave your device.
lp.feat.mobile.title: Mobile Ready
lp.feat.mobile.desc: Responsive design. Review wireframes on your phone during commute.
lp.feat.token.title: Variable Tokens
lp.feat.token.desc: $surface-primary and friends are resolved automatically from the doc.
lp.feat.oss.title: Free & Open Source
lp.feat.oss.desc: MIT licensed. Self-host on GitHub Pages for $0. Contribute on GitHub.
lp.how.title: How it works
lp.how.step1.title: Drop a .pen file
lp.how.step1.desc: or paste a URL / pick a sample
lp.how.step2.title: Parsed & laid out
lp.how.step2.desc: zod validation, variable resolution, flex layout
lp.how.step3.title: View as SVG
lp.how.step3.desc: zoom, pan, frame nav — Figma-like canvas
lp.try.title: Try it now
dropzone.title: Drop a .pen file
dropzone.subtitle: or click to select a file
samples.title: Samples
error.title: Failed to load
error.cors.hint: This may be blocked by CORS. Try drag & drop or pick a sample instead.
